meta.note: Posting strategy, regenerated in place by scripts/ideas-bank.mjs (+ the scheduled Claude layer). Suggestions, never verdicts.

channelPlan.what: World Cup numbers snapshot
channelPlan.verification: Use original platform or reputable reporting and label reported figures.

channelPlan.what: Prediction prices inside ordinary sports journalism
channelPlan.verification: Timestamp the quoted market price and note that transfer rumours remain unconfirmed.

channelPlan.what: Daily Intel: what survives after the World Cup?
channelPlan.verification: Check post-final data on the morning of publication; avoid unsupported retention claims.

channelPlan.what: The World Cup final was an acquisition event. Monday is the product test.
channelPlan.verification: Use only current post-final evidence and distinguish observed behaviour from the thesis.

channelPlan.what: Gopuff puts Polymarket in the shopping basket
channelPlan.verification: Use Gopuff’s official terms. Do not imply the purchase executes a trade or that every entrant becomes a prediction-market user.

channelPlan.what: The World Cup's real result comes after the final
channelPlan.verification: Refresh post-final data and avoid over-reading first-day movement.

channelPlan.what: Goldman Sachs draws a contract-specific compliance line
channelPlan.verification: Label this as a policy first reported before 13 July and recirculated during the 13-14 July news cycle. Attribute to the Financial Times/Bloomberg reporting.

channelPlan.what: Coming Home GBA and the margin route into prediction markets
channelPlan.verification: Confirm the NFA application and CFTC status directly. Separate application, rulebook amendment and approval. Use WuBlockchain only as the lead.

channelPlan.what: Daily Intel: professional interfaces, margin and market structure
channelPlan.verification: Verify NFA/CFTC records; capture Kalshi Pro primary materials; tag Chris DeMuth Jr only against his published view.

channelPlan.what: Kalshi Pro and the private-client signal
channelPlan.verification: Confirm beta status, live functionality, the private-client division and Dillon Borgida’s role from primary company sources. Do not claim institutional adoption from product positioning alone.

channelPlan.what: Prediction markets have entered the clinical-trial timeline
channelPlan.verification: Use the official pilot announcement and rules. Confirm the 13-contract count, exact settlement sources and participant restrictions. AppliedXL provides intelligence; Kalshi remains responsible for market rules and final settlement.

channelPlan.what: The revenue number nobody owns
channelPlan.verification: Draft in Stuart's voice, then approve. No fabricated stats; use bracketed slots for any specific figure.

channelPlan.what: Post-tournament behaviour signal
channelPlan.verification: Verify the signal and compare like-for-like periods.

channelPlan.what: What would prove the World Cup created lasting users?
channelPlan.verification: Keep the prompt short and avoid leading members to one answer.

channelPlan.what: Daily Intel: compliance, education and category identity
channelPlan.verification: Verify Austin’s identity before tagging; quote only published perspectives; check product and licensing claims.

channelPlan.what: Prediction markets are hiring a full operating stack
channelPlan.verification: Refresh every cited role and remove closed vacancies.

channelPlan.what: Prediction markets have entered the restructuring slide
channelPlan.verification: Attribute the 500-role figure and competition wording to Reuters and Entain. Keep tax increases and broader cost reduction in the causal frame.

channelPlan.what: A CRM is a promise about how you sell. The database is the easy part.
channelPlan.verification: Draft in Stuart's voice, then approve. No fabricated stats; use bracketed slots for any specific figure.

channelPlan.what: North Carolina chooses taxation
channelPlan.verification: Confirm signature, effective date and exact tax treatment.

channelPlan.what: When the market thinks, how many traders is that?
channelPlan.verification: Read the underlying paper before publication. Distinguish price influence, trade size and forecasting performance.

channelPlan.what: Gibraltar creates a third regulatory category
channelPlan.verification: Obtain the regulations and regulator announcement directly. Confirm the 13 July effective date, approval process and legal carve-out before publishing.

channelPlan.what: Daily Intel: the developer and infrastructure layer
channelPlan.verification: Open and verify repositories, maintainers, supported platforms and recent activity before tagging.

channelPlan.what: Polymarket blocked in Czechia
channelPlan.verification: Confirm the Ministry of Finance listing, the 15-day ISP timetable and the local legal classification. Avoid implying a Europe-wide rule.

channelPlan.what: The CFTC’s nine-state legal war
channelPlan.verification: Confirm the nine named states and quote the CFTC order or official statement precisely. Keep agency litigation, exchange litigation and state enforcement distinct.

channelPlan.what: THE Q&A: Haifeng Xu
channelPlan.verification: Subject approves every word before publication; no paraphrased quotes; questions reference only verified work.

channelPlan.what: Discounting is a decision you make once and pay for forever
channelPlan.verification: Draft in Stuart's voice, then approve. No fabricated stats; use bracketed slots for any specific figure.

channelPlan.what: The CFTC argument now requires actual answers
channelPlan.verification: Use the current NPRM text and do not overstate the Commission's final position.

channelPlan.what: Blockchain.com embeds Polymarket
channelPlan.verification: Do not publish until Blockchain.com, Polymarket or a regulatory/product document confirms the integration, eligible markets and launch date.

channelPlan.what: NEXTPredict 60 pilot: what did the World Cup leave behind?
channelPlan.verification: Use verified post-final data and subtitle the clip.

channelPlan.what: Daily Intel: source quality and what deserves a story
channelPlan.verification: Verify every corporate and numerical claim; distinguish primary, reputable secondary, promotional and unverified sources.

channelPlan.what: Prediction-market marketing now has a compliance stack
channelPlan.verification: Verify author identity, product claims and any legal statements before publication.

channelPlan.what: Polymarket’s US re-entry meets Europe’s national blocks
channelPlan.verification: Confirm each jurisdictional action separately and distinguish the US product from the international platform.

channelPlan.what: The Prediction Markets are Gambling Act
channelPlan.verification: Locate the bill text, sponsors, status and exact sports-contract provisions. Do not rely on the bill nickname alone.

channelPlan.what: Who watches prediction markets when the SEC and CFTC both have a claim?
channelPlan.verification: Quote the legal analysis narrowly. Distinguish current CFTC jurisdiction, possible SEC involvement and any future coordination from settled law.

channelPlan.what: The America250 backlash is a category-perception warning
channelPlan.verification: Capture the original and removed campaign pages, the criticism and any Kalshi response. Avoid implying motive. Keep Jackie Robinson’s historical significance separate from the campaign critique.

channelPlan.what: Polymarket’s US return meets retreat across Canada and Europe
channelPlan.verification: Use Polymarket’s current official restrictions page and primary regulator sources for each jurisdiction. Do not turn a platform geoblock into a legal conclusion without the underlying order.

channelPlan.what: Where AI actually pays back in a commercial team, and where it just makes noise
channelPlan.verification: Draft in Stuart's voice, then approve. No fabricated stats; use bracketed slots for any specific figure.

channelPlan.what: CFTC comment-letter observations
channelPlan.verification: Read the original submission and separate commenter claims from Commission views.

channelPlan.what: AGA moves into the Wisconsin federal fight
channelPlan.verification: Do not publish until the intervention filing or court docket is obtained directly. The current source is a secondary litigation tracker.

gaps.suggestion: Nothing scheduled this week. Candidate from the ideas bank: "Three CRMs in five years means the CRM was never the problem".

Channel watch: LinkedIn newsletter. Adopt when: Adopt once the Substack cadence has held for 4 consecutive weeks.
Channel watch: Podcast guesting circuit. Adopt when: Pitch 2 shows/month once 3 strong published pieces exist per target lane.
Pillar mix off target: "strait-up-growth" is 8% of the forward schedule vs a 25% target. Add strait-up-growth content (see docs/growth-playbook.md).
Pillar mix off target: "igaming" is 4% of the forward schedule vs a 12% target. Add igaming content (see docs/growth-playbook.md).
Pillar mix off target: "personal" is 0% of the forward schedule vs a 8% target. Add personal content (see docs/growth-playbook.md).
